title: 苹果二义性基底与低秩切换分析

cross_model_summary.core_answer: 苹果的水果义与品牌义更像建立在同一共享名词底座上的两种稳定基底切换。模型先沿着相对独立的 sense switch axis（词义切换轴）区分水果与品牌，再在每个词义内部用少数低秩 modifier directions（修饰方向）完成颜色、味道、产品、价格等组合扩展。

fruit_cases.label: fruit_neutral
fruit_cases.sentence: I bought an apple this morning.

fruit_cases.label: fruit_color
fruit_cases.sentence: The apple is red and shiny.

fruit_cases.label: fruit_sweet
fruit_cases.sentence: The apple tastes sweet and crisp.

fruit_cases.label: fruit_sour
fruit_cases.sentence: The apple tastes slightly sour today.

fruit_cases.label: fruit_size
fruit_cases.sentence: The apple is about the size of a fist.

brand_cases.label: brand_neutral
brand_cases.sentence: Apple announced a new product today.

brand_cases.label: brand_innovative
brand_cases.sentence: Apple is known for innovative hardware design.

brand_cases.label: brand_expensive
brand_cases.sentence: Apple devices are often expensive in many markets.

brand_cases.label: brand_popular
brand_cases.sentence: Apple remains popular among many consumers.

brand_cases.label: brand_fast
brand_cases.sentence: Apple released a faster chip for laptops.
